title: Industrial Defect Management AI
shortDescription: High-precision real-time vision classification for high-speed manufacturing assembly lines.
fullDescription: An end-to-end vision inspection computer system engineered for extreme-accuracy surface anomaly, micro-fracture, and measurement drift detection. Operating at up to 240 frames per second on localized edge hardware, it detects sub-millimeter variances in casting, soldering, or printing, immediately triggering PLC discard triggers.

title: Intelligent Threat Control AI
shortDescription: Next-generation proactive security perimeter threat classification and physical deterrence.
fullDescription: Our Intelligent Threat Control suite combines active multi-spectral camera stream monitoring, audio acoustics analytics, and spatial radar trackers to identify, classify, and track perimeter breaches in real-time. Driven by deep cognitive vision models, it separates harmless motion from tactical intrusions, issuing instant security protocols.
features: Tactical path tracking & speed velocity vectoring
